title: Configure Nginx Load Balancing
description:
## Balance Across a Backend Pool

**Your task:** write a complete Nginx config at **`/root/lb.conf`** that:
1. defines an **`upstream backend`** pool with **three** servers — `10.0.0.1:80`, `10.0.0.2:80`, `10.0.0.3:80`
2. uses the **`least_conn`** balancing algorithm
3. has a `server` on port **80** that `proxy_pass`es to that upstream
4. passes **`nginx -t`**

> 💡 The `upstream { }` block goes inside `http { }`. Test with `nginx -t -c /root/lb.conf`.

hints.title: Upstream + least_conn
hints.body: Declare an upstream block listing the backends with the least_conn directive, then proxy_pass to it by name.

hints.title: Validate
hints.body: nginx -t parses the config and reports success or the exact error and line.

validation.description: Checks valid config, least_conn, and three upstream backends.
